home.faq1Q: Where is the apartment located in Tenerife?
home.faq1A: Our luxury oceanfront apartment is located in Puerto de la Cruz, on the northern coast of Tenerife, Canary Islands. It is just 15 minutes from the famous Loro Park.
home.faq2A: The apartment features a stunning 6.5-meter panoramic window that opens completely, transforming your living space into an open-air terrace with direct views of the Atlantic Ocean. It also has luxury marble interiors throughout.
home.faq3Q: How many guests can the apartment accommodate?
home.faq3A: The apartment comfortably accommodates up to 4 guests with 1 bedroom with a double bed and 2 sofa beds in the living room.
home.faq4A: Yes, the apartment is fully equipped with a modern kitchen including oven, microwave, dishwasher, and washing machine. It also has Wi-Fi, Smart TV, air conditioning, and all necessary amenities for a comfortable stay.
home.faq5A: Rates start from €95 per night, with weekly rates from €595 and monthly rates from €1,800. Contact us directly for the best rates and availability.
home.faq6Q: How do I book the apartment?
home.faq6A: You can book directly with the owner via WhatsApp at +34 644 849 648 or through our contact form. Direct booking means no agency fees and the best possible rates.
home.ctaSubtitle: Book your dream oceanfront apartment directly with the owner. Best rates guaranteed, no booking fees.

propertyData.title: Luxury Oceanfront Apartment in Tenerife
propertyData.shortDescription: Stunning 75m² oceanfront apartment with panoramic Atlantic views, 6.5m opening window, and luxury marble interiors. 15 min from Loro Park.
propertyData.description:
Experience breathtaking ocean views from this stunning 75m² fully furnished apartment on the coast of Tenerife. Located just 15 minutes from Loro Park, this modern apartment features a spectacular 6.5-meter panoramic window that opens completely, transforming your living space into an open-air terrace overlooking the Atlantic Ocean.

The apartment boasts elegant marble flooring throughout, a mirrored ceiling that amplifies the natural light, and a fully equipped modern kitchen with premium appliances. The spacious living area includes two comfortable sofas and a dining area for six, all positioned to take advantage of the incredible sea views.

The bedroom offers a peaceful retreat with a comfortable double bed and built-in wardrobe, while the modern bathroom features a walk-in rain shower with glass partition. Every detail has been carefully considered to provide a luxurious and comfortable stay.

Whether you're watching the sunrise over the ocean from your dining table, cooking in the fully equipped kitchen, or simply relaxing on the sofa with the panoramic window wide open, this apartment offers an unforgettable experience on the beautiful island of Tenerife.

about.pageDescription: Learn about Tenerife Luxury Rentals - your trusted source for premium oceanfront vacation apartments in Tenerife, Canary Islands. Direct from owner.
about.title: Your Home Away From Home in Tenerife
about.p1: We are a family-owned vacation rental business offering premium oceanfront properties in the beautiful island of Tenerife, Canary Islands. With years of experience in hospitality, we provide a personal touch that large booking platforms simply cannot match.
about.p2: Every property in our collection has been carefully selected and maintained to the highest standards. We believe that where you stay is just as important as where you go, and we are committed to making your Tenerife experience unforgettable.
about.imageAlt: Luxury living room with ocean view in our Tenerife apartment
about.value1Desc: Every property is personally managed by the owner, ensuring the highest quality and attention to detail.
about.value2Desc: We genuinely care about our guests' experience and go above and beyond to make every stay special.
about.value3Desc: All our properties are in the most desirable oceanfront locations with breathtaking Atlantic views.
about.value4Desc: Direct booking means no platform commissions. You get luxury accommodation at the fairest price.
about.discoverDesc: Tenerife is the largest and most visited of the Canary Islands, offering an incredible blend of natural beauty, culture, and year-round perfect weather. From the volcanic landscapes of Mount Teide National Park to the lush gardens and stunning coastlines, there is something for everyone.
